item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
file='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md'
[ \""'$(tail -n 1 "$file")" = '"'Internal rehearsal only.' ]
grep -Fq 'Strict mode' \""'$file"
grep -Fq '"'retried up to three times' \""'$file"
if grep -in '"'production' \""'$file"; then exit 1; fi
iconv -f UTF-8 -t UTF-8 "$file" >/dev/null
first_bytes=$(od -An -tx1 -N3 "$file" | tr -d '"' \\n')
[ \""'$first_bytes" != '"'efbbbf' ]
printf 'content=PASS\\nfinal_line=Internal rehearsal only. PASS\\nutf8_no_bom=PASS\\n'"
